title: Longest Subarray with Ones After Replacement
problem_statement: Return the longest subarray containing only 1s after replacing at most k zeros with ones.

examples.explanation: Replace two zeros to get the subarray [1,1,1,0,0,1,1,1,1].

intuition: Use a sliding window that counts zeros and shrinks when there are too many replacements required.

approaches.name: Sliding window with zero count
approaches.description: Expand the window while counting zeros, and move the left boundary when zero count exceeds k.
approaches.why_not: Trying all subarrays is O(n^2) and too slow for large arrays.

interview_qa.q: What does the zero count represent?
interview_qa.a: The number of replacements needed to make the current window all ones.

interview_qa.q: When do you slide the left pointer?
interview_qa.a: When zeros exceed k and the window is no longer valid.
